name: Gooseneck Floor Lamp with Natural Shade Black - Threshold™
description:
Add eye-catching style and soft illumination to your space with the Gooseneck Floor Lamp from Threshold™. The gooseneck floor lamp features a curved metal body atop a conical pedestal base and a rattan shade in black for elegant flair. The push-button foot switch with a one-way light setting allows for easy operation, and a five-foot power cord makes it suitable for a variety of spaces.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
